meaning: vt.在...下面划线,作...的衬里,加下划线,强调n.下划线
examples: Some readers would underline the page as they read.
Secondly, we need to underline the need for the government to take leadership on these issues.
They underline the fact that every subject has its own importance and pupils will absorb knowledge useful for their future.
There's spell check throughout the system now -- look for the red underline to see it working.
And if you want to underline the point, I add a comment attributed to Ari Onassis.
